# Application HTML Contract

## Title

- `<title>` must be `Application Report - <application_name> - GenDiscover`
- The visible H1 inside the title card must be `Application Report - <application_name>`

## Required top block

- The first body card must use `data-testid="app-report-title"`
- It must contain the H1 and an optional application summary paragraph.

## Required section conventions

- Render every major Markdown H2 section as a collapsible card.
- The section wrapper test id must be `section-<slug>`.
- If a section named `Scenario Applicability` exists, its wrapper must be
  `data-testid="section-scenario-applicability"`.

## Embedded data

- The embedded JSON payload should include:
  - app ID
  - report title
  - lead text
  - section list
  - generated timestamp
  - analysis ID

## Footer

- Always include the `Generated by GenDiscover` footer block.
